claim_boundary: v5.12 derives the strongest source-qualified boundary normal-stress and stability architecture. Physical localization, dimensions, coefficients, pressure, embedding, and domain remain insufficient to evaluate L_c or derive an absolute unit.

identities.delta_J: J Tr[(I+rho S)^(-1)rho delta S] for the plus collar convention
identities.delta_K_AB: -nabla_A nabla_B xi_perp+xi_perp(K_A^C K_CB-R_nAnB) under the declared curvature convention
identities.delta_TrS2: 2 Tr(S delta S) plus the inverse-metric variation; equivalently D_Q xi_perp
identities.delta_collar_measure: delta(J dmu_h d rho)=J[K xi_perp+delta log J]dmu_h d rho plus endpoint variation if rho_star moves

reason: v4.1 stores J=det(I +/- rho S); v5.7 selects outward language but does not evaluate the embedding/sign map
reference_convention: K_AB=(1/2)L_n h_AB and outward n; epsilon_n=+1. Opposite normal flips orientation-odd quantities consistently.
